no: Standardizes Viconia appearance across BG1EE/SoD/BG2EE/EET with consistent SoD colors and customizable portrait options. By Lava Del'Vortel. Cosmetic only — no gameplay changes. May conflict with portrait mods that change Viconia (PPE, PaintBG, ViconiaRevamped)

sum: Standardizes Viconia's appearance across BG1EE, BG2EE, SoD, and EET with consistent SoD colors and customizable portrait options.

co.no: Applies SoD Vanilla portrait and consistent skin colors to Viconia across BG1/SoD/BG2. To use alternative portrait, edit the tp2 selectedportrait variable before installing
